# PowerScriptFormula.Index property

Positional index — matches the engine's `[SF_n...]` placeholders in the localized [`Description`](../PowerDefinition/Description.md) (e.g. `[SF_0*100|%x|]` references `Index` = 0).

public int Index { get; set; }
